title: Raccoon Removal in Pelham Manor, NY | $900 – $4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Pelham Manor, Westchester. Safe, humane wildlife control for your home. Licensed experts. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Pelham Manor's beautiful tree-lined streets and elegant homes provide the perfect habitat for raccoons seeking shelter in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces. Our professional raccoon removal services protect your Pelham Manor property from these intelligent and destructive wildlife intruders. Best Pest Control NYC offers safe, humane, and effective raccoon removal with prices ranging from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Pelham Manor homeowners for years with expert raccoon removal that prioritizes both safety and humane treatment. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of wildlife control in Westchester's historic villages and provide comprehensive solutions including removal, exclusion, and damage repair.
localContext: Pelham Manor's stately Colonial and Tudor homes, particularly those near Manor Park and along the Hutchinson River Parkway corridor, often experience raccoon activity due to the area's mature trees and proximity to wooded areas. The village's well-maintained properties and quiet residential streets make attics and chimneys especially attractive to raccoons seeking den sites for raising their young.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Pelham Manor?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Pelham Manor typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on factors such as the number of raccoons, location of the nest, extent of damage, and whether babies are present. A thorough inspection allows us to provide an accurate quote for your specific situation.

faqs.question: What are signs of raccoons in my Pelham Manor home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include loud thumping or scratching noises in the attic at night, torn shingles or damaged soffits, raccoon droppings, scattered garbage, and visible entry holes. You may also hear chirping sounds if baby raccoons are present, especially during spring birthing season.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal in Pelham Manor humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, eco-friendly methods that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. Our approach includes live trapping, safe relocation when permitted, and one-way exclusion doors that allow raccoons to leave but not re-enter. We never use poisons or lethal methods.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Pelham Manor property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Pelham Manor residents. The complete removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on the situation, with follow-up visits to ensure all raccoons have been removed and entry points are properly sealed to prevent future infestations.
